title: Turkish Delight Skewers with Australian Magic
description: A sweet and savory fusion of Turkish delight and Australian magical ingredients, served on a bed of crispy australian vegetables.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Cut the sweet potatoes and carrots into 1-inch pieces.
Thread the sweet potatoes and carrots onto skewers.
Drizzle the Turkish-Style Olive Oil over the skewers and sprinkle with Magical Australian Herb Blend.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Meanwhile, crumble the Turkish Delight into small pieces.
Serve the skewers on a bed of crispy australian vegetables and top with crumbled Turkish Delight.
